author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 2743405. CI fuzz matrix job: 4 targets x 60s on push/PR, 600s on weekly Monday cron + workflow_dispatch, nightly+cargo-fuzz, crash artifacts uploaded on failure; committed seed corpus per target (regex pathologies, CRLF text, valid/malformed JSON, JSON-lookalike pipe input). Coverage: continue-on-error cargo-llvm-cov job emits lcov.info + text summary as artifacts (no external service; Codecov can layer on later). WAR STORY for the knowledge base: verification appeared wedged for 37min — cargo test --workspace was silently running the fuzz workspace because the persistent shell cwd had drifted into fuzz/corpus/, and libfuzzer binaries run forever as 'tests'; initially misdiagnosed as a stuck sccache server. Diagnose via /proc/<cargo-pid> children + cwd. 25 suites green from repo root.
